message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'memalloc_noio_restore' sets signal field 'task_struct.flags', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=task_struct;field=flags;offset=44] [oracle:assert=task_struct.flags stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets flags without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
